name: Allan Reuss
abstract: Allan Reuss (June 15, 1915 – June 4, 1988) was an American jazz guitarist.

concerts.label: Benny Goodman and His Swing Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Marty Grosz
about_quotes.evidence: And set as my idols, those guys like Allan Reuss, and Mike Bryan and Eddie Condon and Freddie Green and whoever else I could think of.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marty Grosz interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, September 4, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Bucky Pizzarelli
about_quotes.evidence: We knew about George Van Eps and we know about Allan Reuss, all the guys who knew how to play rhythm like that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bucky Pizzarelli interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 23, 2003 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Danny Barker
about_quotes.evidence: Allan Reuss was a master. He was with Benny Goodman. ... I know his name. Allan Reuss.
about_quotes.doc_title: Danny Barker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Red Callender
about_quotes.evidence: I remember Allan Reuss... But we used to record almost every day.
